questions.question: What is the man in the gray hoodie doing in the first sequence?

questions.rationale: Main action of the primary subject across multiple frames

questions.question: Where does this video take place?

questions.rationale: Identifies the food source and brand context in the video

questions.question: What text appears on the Burger King packaging?
questions.rationale: On-screen text provides additional context about the content
